title: rosa coriifolia subvar. lucida
intro: Rosa coriifolia subvar. lucida, also known as the shiny rose or shiny wild rose, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Rosa coriifolia subvar. lucida is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and promoting skin and hair health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
